arguments.reason: The close-out is concrete and evidence-based: it identifies the exact dashed-to-underscore config path mismatch, describes the implemented reconciliation and collision-preservation behavior, cites targeted validation for the original env override plus underscore-name control case, and reports successful Cargo check/test results with counts. The artifact also notes the irrelevant Go-style command as a misleading signal and captures a specific lesson for similar bugs.
